title: Fault Code 01 - Flow Fault
summary: Flow fault indicating water shortage, pump failure, or fan failure.

structured_payload.description: 流量故障 (缺水、水泵、送风机故障等)

evidence_quote: 01－流量故障 (缺水、水泵、送风机故障等 )

title: Fault Code 02 - Fan/Phase/Interlock Fault
summary: Fan, current phase loss, or external interlock fault.

structured_payload.description: 风机、电流缺相 、外部连锁故障

evidence_quote: 02－风机、电流缺相 、外部连锁故障

title: Fault Code 03 - Compressor 1 High Pressure Fault
Fault Code 04 - Compressor 1 Low Pressure Fault
Fault Code 09 - Return Water/Air Temperature Sensor Fault
summary: Return water or air temperature sensor fault.

structured_payload.description: 回水（风）温度传感器故障

title: Fault Code 10 - Ambient Temperature Sensor Fault
Cooling Water Temperature Setpoint
summary: Cooling water temperature setpoint range 01-18, default 12°C.
evidence_quote: １ No:01 原值 制冷水温度设定  01-18  12℃

title: Heating Water Temperature Setpoint
summary: Heating water temperature setpoint range 30-50, default 45°C.
evidence_quote: 2 No:02 原值 制热水温度设定  30-50 45℃

title: Compressor Restart Delay
summary: After stopping, compressor requires 3 minutes before restart; if ON/OFF pressed within 2 minutes, dual compressor system may start simultaneously.
evidence_quote: 操作一旦停止 ，即使立刻按下 “ON/OF”键，压缩机仍需要 3分钟才可重新启动 。但如果2分钟内重新按下 “ON/OFF”键，双机系统可能会同时启动

title: Filter Cleaning Reset
summary: When filter timer reaches 1000 hours, a flashing symbol appears; after cleaning, press RESET for 3 seconds to clear.
evidence_quote: 室内送风机滤网使用计时满 1000小时，即会出现 “       ”图案闪烁显示，此时即表示送风机滤网需要清洗 。清洗后，按“RESET”键，并保持3秒以上，直至闪烁显示消除
